title: stelis nitens
intro: Stelis nitens, also known as the shining stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis nitens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stelis nitens is typically used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
